CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated, and a row is added to this table.  
The third column specifies which sections or sub-sections have been updated. The fourth column should 
mention the reason for updating the document. Column 5 should include the names of the author(s) 
doing the changes. Including the name in column 6 shows that the document has been validated by the 
TAC/MFC PQ leader or deputy (or TA C/MFC PQ leader or the deputy). This validation means the 
document was checked for contents, formats and consistency with other documents.

ACRONYM TABLE 
Acronym Description 
TAC Copernicus Marine Service Thematic Assembly Centre 
NRT Near Real Time 
REP Reprocessing 
MY Multi-year 
 
KEY DEFINITIONS 
Technical word Definition  
Buddy checking Comparison of the sea level from the target tide gauge to the sea level 
from a nearby tide gauge 
Completeness Index Index ranging from 0 to 1 that shows the percentage of complete data, in 
comparison to the data-less intervals of time. 
Tidal constituents Each one of the components that would add up to the astronomical tide

catalog_entry.summary: This document describes the INSITU_GLO_PHY_SSH_DISCRETE_MY_013_053 product, a global ocean delayed mode sea level product with updates on quality improvements and changes in detiding technique.
